headline: Does Duke’s Record US$103 Billion Grid and Nuclear Buildout Reshape the Bull Case for DUK?
summary: Duke Energy has recently outlined an industry-record US$103.00 billion, five-year investment plan to expand gas-fired plants, solar, batteries, and grid upgrades while also securing a 20-year license renewal for its Robinson Nuclear Plant, which now has approval to operate through 2050. These moves underline how Duke is tying long-lived nuclear assets to massive grid and generation investment to support rising data center and regional power demand over multiple decades. We’ll now examine how...

headline: Nuclear Energy Stocks to Gain From Rising Clean Energy Transition
summary: Investors seeking exposure to the nuclear energy space may find compelling opportunities in companies such as PG&E, CEG and DUK.

headline: Duke Energy commits $1 million to strengthen nonprofits helping North Carolina customers meet essential needs
summary: The Duke Energy Foundation is committing $1 million to support nonprofit organizations across North Carolina that deliver critical community services, including housing stability, food access, health care, utility assistance and more.
